title: KrakenD Backend
description: A Backend defines a target service that a KrakenD endpoint connects to, including the host, URL pattern, encoding, and data manipulation settings.

host.description: List of backend host URLs. Overrides the service-level host list.

url_pattern.description: The URL path to request on the backend. Supports parameter placeholders.

encoding.description: The encoding of the backend response.

sd.description: Service discovery method. Static resolves at startup, DNS resolves per request.

method.description: HTTP method to use when calling the backend. Defaults to the endpoint method.

group.description: Wraps the backend response under this key name for response merging.

target.description: Extracts a nested object from the backend response using this key.

mapping.description: Renames backend response fields. Key is original name, value is new name.

allow.description: Whitelist of fields to include from the backend response.

deny.description: Blacklist of fields to exclude from the backend response.

is_collection.description: Set to true when the backend response is an array instead of an object.

extra_config.description: Additional component configurations keyed by namespace.
